creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Rejected, sorry - the upgrade does not provide any functional change
outside the Windows world. No need to force thousands of users to waste
bandwidth and CPU cycles.

This is documented at the head of the Makefile, see
<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/security/openvpn/Makefile?rev=1.34;content-type=text%2Fplain>

-- 
Matthias Andree
